TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sengan, title = Sengan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sengan} }

S.FORM: alang Sengan ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 93 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 85 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sengan hya' ga Bngwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sengan ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 93 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 85 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sengan hya' ga Bngwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕeŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕeŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βŋwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
